{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612917673282421528","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情是康熙死后陪了雍正八年，亲眼看他累到油尽灯枯。一朝重生，只想好好宠他！正史走向，非常不错！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772523262,"group_id":"7603691704977198104","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0t2mJyDbt9RUWRnQkwYRLM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617805&x-signature=tKjbkp0JAbrDpUCor58zq965eto%3D","user_id":"108633912587","user_name":"喜欢仙鹤来的冰原"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108633912587","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603691704977198104","book_info":{"abstract":"康熙六十一年十一月在畅春园去世的康熙成为鬼魂见证新皇雍正励精图治，雍正八年怡亲王去世。在雍正的极度悲伤中康熙重生回到康熙二十九年。一切重头开始这一世的康熙只想规避九子夺嫡的悲惨。可随着时间发展，康熙发现，即使两世帝王也更改不了历史。
这一世胤禛定会护住胤祥，这一世胤禩是否还会和胤禛渐行渐远，这一世九子夺嫡下场如何？
重生类小说，改变不了历史，在历史的洪流里领悟父子亲情，做更好的自己。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3d5fc694e9bf79a63528061f69f5d755~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"林栖墨渟","author_id":"","book_id":"7603691704977198104","book_name":"明知结局，康熙还是重来了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1139,"name":"古风世情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1139&name=古风世情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603692250714882584","read_count":"813","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"230554"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"85","tags":"古风世情,古言权谋,位尊权重","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/99ce95121578e8a2885a2da6df2bd571~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254734&x-signature=HsM%2BXxE10675v05i54vcGeiO0H4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"523833008203560","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15084,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26864,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":76},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1772545291,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"康熙六十一年十一月在畅春园去世的康熙成为鬼魂见证新皇雍正励精图治，雍正八年怡亲王去世。在雍正的极度悲伤中康熙重生回到康熙二十九年。一切重头开始这一世的康熙只想规避九子夺嫡的悲惨。可随着时间发展，康熙发现，即使两世帝王也更改不了历史。
